scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @hearth/shared build && pnpm --filter @hearth/module-sdk build && pnpm --filter @hearth/core build && pnpm -r --parallel --filter @hearth/shared --filter @hearth/module-sdk --filter @hearth/core --filter @hearth/server --filter @hearth/web dev
scripts.test:prepare: pnpm --filter @hearth/shared build && pnpm --filter @hearth/module-sdk build && pnpm --filter @hearth/core build
scripts.test: pnpm test:prepare && pnpm --filter @hearth/module-sdk test && pnpm --filter @hearth/server test && pnpm --filter @hearth/web test
scripts.verify: pnpm format:check && pnpm docs:check && pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm test:e2e
